LAW AND MOTION, 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS DENIED. THE FULL BOARD'S DECISION NOT TO ADOPT THE ADMINISTRATIVE LAW JUDGE DECISION JUSTIFIES FINDING GOOD CAUSE TO TAKE MORE THAN 15 DAYS BECAUSE IT NECESSARILY INVOLVES FURTHER PROCEEDINGS THAT HAVE TO TAKE PLACE.
